text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 401 

PRE_ICL_OONP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Out-of-Network Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the 
Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_OONP_COPAY_1M
